treatments.Apple___Apple_scab: Apply fungicide (captan or myclobutanil). Remove infected leaves. Improve air circulation.
treatments.Apple___healthy: No treatment needed. Continue regular care and monitoring.
treatments.Corn_(maize)___Common_rust: Apply fungicide (azoxystrobin). Plant resistant varieties. Rotate crops.
treatments.Corn_(maize)___healthy: No treatment needed. Maintain proper nutrition and irrigation.
treatments.Grape___Black_rot: Remove infected fruit/leaves. Apply mancozeb or captan fungicide. Maintain canopy airflow.
treatments.Grape___healthy: No treatment needed. Continue regular pruning and monitoring.
treatments.Potato___Early_blight: Apply chlorothalonil or mancozeb fungicide. Rotate crops. Remove plant debris.
treatments.Potato___healthy: No treatment needed. Maintain proper watering and fertilization.
treatments.Tomato___Bacterial_spot: Apply copper-based bactericide. Remove infected plants. Avoid overhead irrigation.
treatments.Tomato___Early_blight: Apply chlorothalonil fungicide. Mulch around plants. Stake plants for airflow.
treatments.Tomato___Late_blight: Apply metalaxyl or chlorothalonil. Remove infected plants immediately. Avoid wet foliage.
treatments.Tomato___Leaf_Mold: Improve ventilation. Reduce humidity. Apply fungicide if severe.
treatments.Tomato___healthy: No treatment needed. Continue regular care.
treatments.Rice___Brown_spot: Apply mancozeb or carbendazim. Use balanced fertilization. Treat seeds before planting.
treatments.Rice___healthy: No treatment needed. Maintain proper water management.
